todos.title: Clarify XMatters on-call duty with Tsahi
todos.context: Tsahi responded to Avinash's question about XMatters with 'Do you really want to know?' — implying an active or imminent on-call assignment.
todos.problem: It's unclear whether Avinash is currently on the XMatters rotation. If active and unacknowledged, missed escalations could impact production incident SLAs.
todos.solution: Reply to Tsahi directly asking for a straight answer on current XMatters rotation status and dates.
todos.action_plan:
1. Reply to Tsahi: 'Am I currently on XMatters rotation? If yes, what are the dates?'
2. Log in to XMatters portal to check schedule independently.
3. If on-call, confirm incident runbook access.
4. Set up phone alerts if not already configured.

todos.title: Send Prakash action items from today's release meeting
todos.context: Prakash Padadune messaged that he missed today's OD release readiness meeting and requested action items.
todos.problem: Prakash is a dependency owner who missed the meeting. Without action items, his workstream is blocked and the release plan gaps won't close on time.
todos.solution: Compile key decisions and Prakash-specific action items from the meeting bot summary and send to him via Teams today.
todos.action_plan:
1. Review today's meeting bot summary for the release readiness session.
2. Extract action items specific to Prakash's workstream.
3. Send a concise Teams message: decisions, his action items, deadlines.
4. Request acknowledgment by EOD.

todos.title: Review CSA-87472: AI Agent Evaluations Launch Readiness
todos.context: CSA-87472 is a P2 Epic for AI Agent Evaluations Launch Readiness assigned to Avishay Robinov. Updated early this morning with an attachment — likely a readiness checklist or blocker report.
todos.problem: An early-morning update with an attachment on a launch readiness epic signals something was flagged that needs PM attention before it delays the launch timeline.
todos.solution: Open the ticket, review the attachment, assess for blockers, and update the launch readiness status with next steps.
todos.action_plan:
1. Open CSA-87472 and review the new attachment and comment thread.
2. Identify any open blockers or gaps in launch readiness criteria.
3. Assign owners to unresolved items with deadlines.
4. Confirm with Avishay what's outstanding.

todos.title: Triage CSA-70457: Agent Name blank in OD Export (P2 customer bug)
todos.context: CSA-70457 is a P2 customer-reported bug: Agent Name field is blank in Copilot OD exports. Still in New status — unassigned for 2+ days.
todos.problem: A customer-visible P2 bug has been open 2+ days without an assignee. Customer-reported bugs require rapid triage.
todos.solution: Assign to OD engineering owner, add to current sprint, set fix target date, and acknowledge to customer.
todos.action_plan:
1. Open CSA-70457 and identify the export field mapping for Agent Name.
2. Assign to OD engineering engineer.
3. Add to current sprint with P2 SLA target.
4. Acknowledge receipt to the reporting customer with expected fix timeframe.

todos.title: Sprint-assign CSA-27680: OD AI Agent Phase 2 (Ready for Dev)
todos.context: CSA-27680 (OD - AI Agent - Phase 2) moved to Ready for Dev and was updated this morning at 9:44 AM IST. Currently no assignee.
todos.problem: Ticket is ready for engineering but has no sprint assignment — risks being missed in planning.
todos.solution: Confirm sprint capacity, assign to the right engineer, add to current or upcoming sprint.
todos.action_plan:
1. Check current sprint capacity with OD engineering lead.
2. Assign CSA-27680 to the appropriate engineer.
3. Add to current or upcoming sprint in Jira.
4. Confirm acceptance criteria are clear with the engineer.

todos.title: Sprint-assign CSA-85711: Copilot Analytics UX Improvements
todos.context: CSA-85711 (Copilot Agent Analytics — Layout & UX Improvements) is Ready for Dev, assigned to Sherry Mashavi. No sprint assigned.
todos.problem: Sherry is assigned but without a sprint she can't schedule the work, causing planning ambiguity.
todos.solution: Confirm scope with Sherry, verify acceptance criteria, and add to appropriate sprint today.
todos.action_plan:
1. Ping Sherry to confirm she's ready to start.
2. Verify acceptance criteria on CSA-85711 are complete.
3. Add to current sprint in Jira.
4. Confirm sprint goal alignment in next standup.

todos.title: Triage CSA-85733: AutoSummary showing Ignored incorrectly (P2)
todos.context: CSA-85733 is a P2 bug where AutoSummary displays Ignored for summaries without actual text. Affects New Analytics and Integrations. Open for 3 days in New status.
todos.problem: A P2 bug in New Analytics has been sitting unassigned for 3 days — risks aging past SLA. May share root cause with CSA-59030.
todos.solution: Assign to New Analytics engineering, investigate root cause connection with CSA-59030, target a fix this sprint.
todos.action_plan:
1. Confirm reproduction steps with reporter.
2. Check if CSA-85733 and CSA-59030 share the same root cause.
3. Assign to New Analytics engineering lead.
4. Target fix within current sprint.

todos.title: Review Ammon's updated product requirements in Confluence
todos.context: Ammon Lewis updated a product requirements Confluence page yesterday. Ammon is a key OD stakeholder whose specs directly impact sprint scope.
todos.problem: Unreviewed requirements changes from Ammon can lead to misaligned implementation.
todos.solution: Review the updated page using page history, add inline comments, and update related Jira tickets if scope changed.
todos.action_plan:
1. Open the Confluence page from the CQL search results.
2. Use Compare versions to see exactly what changed.
3. Add inline comments on sections needing clarification.
4. Update related Jira tickets if scope changed.

todos.title: Review CSA-83447: Lyra Design Adoption (updated today)
todos.context: CSA-83447 ([CrossCX] Lyra Design Adoption: Observability Dashboard) updated at 12:33 PM IST today. Part of the CrossCX Lyra design migration.
todos.problem: A midday update could be a comment requiring PM input — leaving it unreviewed risks blocking the design team.
todos.solution: Check what changed and respond with PM input if requested.
todos.action_plan:
1. Open CSA-83447 and check the latest comment or field change.
2. Determine if design review or PM approval is needed.
3. Reply with input if requested.
4. Update ticket status as appropriate.

todos.title: Triage CSA-63844: Noisy Rules Detection epic (updated today)
todos.context: CSA-63844 (Noisy & Problematic Rules Detection) updated this morning at 10:23 AM IST with no assignee. Related to Rules Engine (CSA-31479).
todos.problem: Epic has no owner and unclear status — may need PM scoping to link to CSA-31479 or mark as a separate roadmap item.
todos.solution: Review what changed, link to CSA-31479 if appropriate, assign ownership, add to backlog grooming.
todos.action_plan:
1. Open CSA-63844 and review today's changes.
2. Determine if this is a child of CSA-31479 or standalone.
3. Assign to appropriate engineer or product owner.
4. Add to next backlog grooming session.

todos.title: Review Customer Data Deletion alignment corrections email
todos.context: An email about Customer Data Deletion alignment corrections arrived. OD has three active epics: CSA-42413, CSA-42414, CSA-42415, all assigned to Manthan Madannawar.
todos.problem: If corrections change the spec, Manthan may be building to wrong requirements.
todos.solution: Read email, identify what changed, update relevant Jira epics, notify Manthan.
todos.action_plan:
1. Read the Customer Data Deletion alignment email fully.
2. Compare corrections against current epic descriptions.
3. Update Jira tickets CSA-42413/14/15 with corrections.
4. Ping Manthan Madannawar with a summary of changes.

todos.title: Review NPI process email and complete any gate actions
todos.context: An NPI (New Product Introduction) process email arrived. NPI gate emails typically require PM sign-off or milestone acknowledgment.
todos.problem: NPI gate actions have hard deadlines — an unread email could mean a missed gate that blocks release.
todos.solution: Read email, identify required actions, complete before deadline, calendar milestones.
todos.action_plan:
1. Open and read the NPI process email.
2. Identify any required PM actions or sign-off.
3. Complete gate actions or delegate with a deadline.
4. Calendar any upcoming NPI milestone dates.

todos.title: Assign CSA-81265: Hardcoded endpoint filters in AI Agents Eval (P3)
todos.context: CSA-81265 is a P3 bug where endpoint filters are hardcoded in the AI Agents Evaluation tab. Updated yesterday.
todos.problem: Hardcoded filters limit the evaluation feature's flexibility across customer environments.
todos.solution: Assign to a New Analytics engineer for current or next sprint.
todos.action_plan:
1. Confirm with engineering whether this is a config fix or code change.
2. Assign to a New Analytics engineer.
3. Target for current or next sprint.
4. Verify fix in staging before release.

todos.title: Close RTI V5 action item — Matan confirmed it's sending
todos.context: Matan Mizrahi confirmed RTI V5 primary and secondary sources ARE being sent to OD and shared the spec doc. This resolves the open RTI V5 question from release planning.
todos.problem: RTI V5 was an open risk item — now resolved but related tickets may still show it as open.
todos.solution: Update related Jira tickets, share Matan's spec doc with OD engineering, close the action item.
todos.action_plan:
1. Open Matan's RTI V5 Confluence page and bookmark it.
2. Share the doc link with OD engineering lead.
3. Update Jira tickets that listed RTI V5 as an open risk.
4. Close the RTI V5 item from the release risk register.

todos.title: Note MAX SSO deploying tomorrow — watch for OD impact
todos.context: Uttam Chakraborty confirmed SSO for MAX is deploying tomorrow (July 3). Informational — no immediate action unless OD has a MAX authentication dependency.
todos.problem: No direct action required, but an unmonitored SSO deployment could cause brief OD integration disruption.
todos.solution: Flag to OD engineering to monitor tomorrow's MAX SSO deployment for side effects.
todos.action_plan:
1. Note MAX SSO deployment date: July 3.
2. Check if any OD integrations authenticate through MAX.
3. Alert OD engineering lead to monitor during deployment window.
4. No further action unless an issue is reported.
